pattern: Locate the first occurrence of the target character, reverse everything up to and including it, and leave the rest of the word untouched - if the character never appears, nothing changes at all.
hints: Only the first occurrence of the character matters, even if it shows up again later in the word.
Find the index of that first occurrence; if it never occurs, the word is returned exactly as given.
Reverse the slice from the start through that index, then glue the untouched remainder of the word back onto the end.

edge_inputs.description: character appears in the middle of the word
character never appears, word is unchanged
single character word matching the target
target character is the very first letter
target character is the very last letter
target character repeats, only the first occurrence counts
longest word, all one repeated letter matching the target

stress.description: random words and target characters near the max length
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 250))
    word = ''.join(rng.choice('abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz') for _ in range(n))
    ch = rng.choice('abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz')
    return [word, ch]
